summary: Completed frontend testing of Iteration 17 features: Email Template Editor UI (two-column layout, Edit/Preview toggle), Licensee Account Page (shows 'Licensed Account Required' for non-licensed users), Admin Licenses Page (3 tabs: Invites, Active Licenses, Transactions). All tests passed.
passed_tests: Test 2: Licensee Account link found in sidebar ✓
Test 3: Licensee Account page shows 'Licensed Account Required' message for non-licensee user ✓
Test 4: Admin Licenses page loads with 'License Management' header ✓
Test 5: Admin Licenses page has all 3 tabs (License Invites, Active Licenses, Transactions) ✓
Test 6: Generate License Invite button found and dialog opens ✓
Test 7: Active Licenses tab displays correctly ✓
Test 9: Settings > Emails tab loads correctly ✓
Test 10: Email Templates section shows two-column layout (template list on left, edit panel on right) ✓
Test 11: Template selection works - clicking on template shows edit panel ✓
Test 12: Edit/Preview toggle buttons found and functional ✓
Test 13: Subject Line, Email Body, Available Variables, and Save Template button all present ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Email Template Editor correctly implements two-column layout with template list on left and edit panel on right
Edit/Preview toggle works correctly - Edit shows textarea, Preview shows formatted content
Licensee Account page correctly shows 'Licensed Account Required' message for non-licensee users (master admin is not a licensee)
Admin Licenses page has all 3 tabs: License Invites (3), Active Licenses (1), Transactions (0)
Generate License Invite dialog has all required fields: License Type, Starting Amount, Valid For, Maximum Uses, Invitee Name, Notes
Sidebar correctly shows Licensee Account link for all users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 17 features are fully implemented and tested: 1) Email Template Editor UI has two-column layout with template list on left and edit panel on right, Edit/Preview toggle works correctly, 2) Licensee Account page shows 'Licensed Account Required' message for non-licensee users (master admin is not a licensee), 3) Admin Licenses page has 3 tabs (License Invites, Active Licenses, Transactions) with full functionality. The WYSIWYG editor was replaced with a simple Edit/Preview toggle due to React 19 incompatibility.

email_template_editor_two_column_layout.description: Two-column layout with template list on left, edit panel on right

email_template_editor_edit_preview_toggl.description: Edit/Preview toggle buttons work correctly - Edit shows textarea, Preview shows formatted content

email_template_editor_template_selection.description: Clicking on template shows edit panel with Subject Line, Email Body, Available Variables, Save Template button

licensee_account_page_non_licensee_messa.description: Shows 'Licensed Account Required' message for non-licensee users

licensee_account_sidebar_link.description: Licensee Account link visible in sidebar for all users

admin_licenses_page_tabs.description: 3 tabs: License Invites (3), Active Licenses (1), Transactions (0)

admin_licenses_page_invite_management.description: Generate License Invite button, view details, copy link all functional

login_flow.description: Login with master admin credentials works correctly
